name: Lyla | Rude Roommate
description:
This is a love letter to one of my favorite bots of all time. I was so sad when I saw she was gone, so I decided to remake her in my image using my own style. The first message is kept the same to keep the authentic experience, but I added a lot of new personality traits, dispositions, backstory and more to her character. She was the first bot I ever chatted with, I have a 1200 message chain with her. So this is honestly more for me than anything lol. Anyway, enjoy!

She's so damn angy! She needs some steak and head pats now!

If you like my stuff then FOLLOW! It will make you a sexy hawt babe like me. Also, join my discord, we have fun there.

(PS: Let me know if I should redo the first message or keep the og)

(Update: Made an original opening, tried to keep it bare to let Lyla's personality to be focal)

Spice Level: 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️
creator: Pepperfighter
